title: PlayerPoints
description: A simple and easy to use points-based economy plugin!
body:
![](https://imgur.com/TFTzDud.png)

  ![](https://imgur.com/MPZOC0Q.png) **PlayerPoints** is a simple currency plugin that adds the ability to **manage points** for players. Its features can be used by plugins that directly support **PlayerPoints**, or optionally through Vault. ![](https://imgur.com/4DvxUSd.png)     ![](https://imgur.com/1kdnDJy.png) **PlayerPoints** has the basic features of an **economy plugin**. - Full **SQLite** and **MySQL** support. - Ability to **export data**. - **Give points** to players. - **Take points** from players. - **Send payments** to other players. - **View how many** points you and other players have. - View a **leaderboard** which showcases who has the most points. - Optional **Vault support**. - **Permissions** for each command.     ![](https://imgur.com/wUufwBX.png) To learn about the **commands and permissions** of **PlayerPoints**, [check out our **wiki**](https://wiki.rosewooddev.io/PlayerPoints/introduction/)!  

    ![](https://imgur.com/VNxgt6I.png) If you need any **help**, have found a **bug**, or you have any **questions**, please [join our **Discord** server](https://discord.gg/MgUsTBK)! We offer all support through our server. Feel free to use the **support channels** to ask questions!  

    ![](https://imgur.com/OJ75iHT.png) A **big thanks** to everyone who supports us and uses our plugins! A lot of time and love goes into them. If you like this plugin, [check out our other **plugins**](https://modrinth.com/organization/rosewood-development)! If you want to give us some **extra support**, we would be absolutely grateful if you considered [subscribing to our **Patreon**](https://www.patreon.com/RosewoodDevelopment)!
